lexis 0.1.0
  • Reference

Match stimulus words on psycholinguistic properties

Source: R/match.R
lex_match.Rd

Given a set of target words and a pool of candidate words, finds the best match(es) in the pool for each target on a specified set of norm dimensions, using standardized Euclidean distance. Useful for constructing matched word lists in experimental designs (e.g., matched on AoA and concreteness but differing on valence).

lex_match(targets, pool = NULL, dims, n = 1, exclude = NULL)

Arguments

targets

character vector. Words to find matches for.

pool

character vector or NULL. Candidate words to match against. If NULL (default), the full lexis_wide vocabulary minus the targets is used.

dims

character vector. Norm dimensions to match on. Must be column names in lexis_wide (e.g., c("aoa", "concreteness")).

n

integer. Number of matches to return per target (default 1).

exclude

character vector or NULL. Additional words to exclude from the candidate pool (e.g., practice items).

Value

A tibble with columns: target, match (word form of best match), distance (standardized Euclidean distance; lower = better match), and one column per requested dimension showing the matched word's value. If n > 1, multiple rows per target are returned.

Details

Words with missing values on any requested dimension are silently excluded from the candidate pool. Targets with missing values receive NA matches.

Examples

# Match targets on AoA and concreteness
lex_match(c("knife", "hammer"), dims = c("aoa", "concreteness"))
#> # A tibble: 2 × 5
#>   target match distance   aoa concreteness
#>   <chr>  <chr>    <dbl> <dbl>        <dbl>
#> 1 knife  coin   0.0122   4.17         4.89
#> 2 hammer syrup  0.00971  5.42         4.76

# Match within a restricted pool, get top 3
my_pool <- lex_filter(concreteness = c(3, 5))$word
lex_match("storm", pool = my_pool, dims = c("aoa", "valence"), n = 3)
#> # A tibble: 3 × 5
#>   target match distance   aoa valence
#>   <chr>  <chr>    <dbl> <dbl>   <dbl>
#> 1 storm  bible  0.00373  4.95    5.74
#> 2 storm  class  0.00924  4.95    5.73
#> 3 storm  plane  0.0173   4.95    5.72
